title: Tsuritama
titleNative: つり球
synopsis: You can't catch fish if you don't go fishing, and you can't make friends if you don't at least try. Which is how relationship-challenged student Yuki finds himself on a fishing trip to a tiny island with three other boys he barely knows. Well, two other boys and Haru, who claims that he's an alien. Not that constantly stewing Natsuki or mysterious Akira are any more likely as prospects for good companionship. But there's something about fishing that makes it unlike any other pastime, and maybe that quiet sense of companionship and hopeful expectation is just what Yuki needs to start charting the unfamiliar waters of personal connections. Or maybe it will turn out that Haru's right and they're going to have to save the entire planet. There are lots of different kinds of fish stories, from the "ones that got away" to the "best catches ever," but whichever way the currents of life take them, for four young men, this trip may turn out to be the biggest whopper ever! (Source: Sentai Filmwor

title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: Peace for the Future! The Spirit of Goku is Forever
titleRomaji: Dragon Ball Kai: Mirai ni Heiwa wo! Goku no Tamashii yo Eien ni
titleEnglish: Dragon Ball Z Kai: Peace for the Future! The Spirit of Goku is Forever
titleNative: ドラゴンボール改 未来に平和を！悟空の魂よ永遠に
synonyms: Dragon Ball Z Kai: Pokój dla przyszłości! Duch Gokū jest wieczny!
Dragon Ball Z Kai E98: ¡Un Futúro Pacífico! ¡El Espíritu de Gokú es Eterno!
synopsis: Special episode about Trunks going back to the future and fighting the Androids. Also known as episode 98 of Dragon Ball Kai. This episode was originally scheduled to air in Japan on March 27, 2011, but Fuji TV postponed its broadcast to air news coverage on the Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami. The episode was eventually released as an "extra" episode on Blu-ray and DVD in Japan on August 2, 2011. At this point the episode has not been broadcast in any subsequent re-runs of the series and is only viewable in Japan through home video releases.

titleNative: シュガシュガルーン
synonyms: Chocola et Vanilla - Sugar Sugar Rune
synopsis: Chocolat Meilleure and Vanilla Mieux are two witches who are pitched in a contest to see who will become the new Queen of the Witch World. They must travel to the Human World and collect the hearts of humans. Whoever collects the most "human hearts" wins. Even though they're rivals, the two are still best friends. Join them on this adventure!

title: Galaxy Express 999 (Movie)
titleNative: 銀河鉄道999
synopsis: After the death of his mother at the hands of the evil robot Count Mecha, young Tetsuro has become a delinquent street urchin who dreams only of revenge. Tetsuro lives in a far future world in which humans have the choice to travel to another planet where they can exchange their bodies for immortal, robotic counterparts. His goal is to someday acquire (through theft) enough money to board the Galaxy Express 999, a train which is capable of traveling through space, and which will take him to the planet of robots. One day, after escaping from the police, he meets the beautiful Maetel, who resembles his mother. She offers to take him on the Galaxy Express 999 to get a robotic body and to get revenge on Count Mecha. Along the journey, the two meet many varied people (including Captain Harlock and Queen Emeraldas), and Tetsuro learns what it means to be human. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Shin Gintama Movie: Yoshiwara Daienjou
titleNative: 新劇場版 銀魂 -吉原大炎上-
synonyms: New Gintama the Movie: Yoshiwara in Flames
synopsis: Movie remake of the Yoshiwara Enjou arc. Upon meeting a young boy named Haruta who makes a living as a pickpocket, Gintoki discovers that he is pickpocketing out of a desire to meet his long-lost mother, Hiwa, Yoshiwara's number one courtesan. Gintoki and his friends venture to Yoshiwara to fulfill Haruta's wish, but standing in their way is Housen, the Night King who rules Yoshiwara. Note: This anime was announced at the "Gintama Multiverse Festival," an event held on August 16th, as part of the "Gintama 20th Anniversary Project." This movie features volumes 25 and 26 of the manga, and the TV anime series spans eight episodes, from episodes 139 to 146.

title: BLUE LOCK THE MOVIE -EPISODE NAGI-
titleNative: ブルーロック -EPISODE 凪-
synonyms: 劇場版 ブルーロック
synopsis: My life was full of boredom. Until I met him. “That’s a hassle.” That was second-year high schooler Nagi Seishirou’s favorite phrase as he lived his dull life. Until Reo Mikage, a classmate who dreamed of winning the World Cup, discovered Nagi’s hidden skill, inspiring him to play soccer and share his outstanding talent. Nagi is pulled into Reo's world of soccer and out of his leisurely lifestyle. What fate awaits this prodigy in BLUE LOCK?: A world he’s never known. (Source: Crunchyroll, edited)

title: NieR:Automata Ver1.1a
titleNative: NieR:Automata Ver1.1a
synonyms: ニーア オートマタ
synopsis: The distant future, 5012. The sudden aerial invasion of Earth by ＜Aliens＞ and their creations ＜Machine Lifeforms＞led mankind to the brink of extinction. The surviving number of humans who took refuge on the moon to organize a counterattack using ＜android＞ soldiers to recapture Earth. However, the war reaches a stalemate as the ＜Machine Lifeforms＞ continue to multiply infinitely. In turn, humanity deploys anew unit of android soldiers as an ultimate weapon: ＜YoRHa＞ Newly dispatched to Earth ＜2B＞ joins＜9S＞, the analyst currently stationed there, where amid their mission, they encounter a myriad of mysterious phenomena... This is the story of these lifeless ＜androids＞ and their endless fight for the sake of mankind. (Source: NieR:Automata Ver1.1a Official USA Website) Note: Episodes 9, 10, 11, 12 aired back-to-back on July 23, 2023.

title: Yuki Yuna is a Hero: The Great Mankai Chapter
titleRomaji: Yuuki Yuuna wa Yuusha de Aru: Dai-Mankai no Shou
titleEnglish: Yuki Yuna is a Hero: The Great Mankai Chapter
titleNative: 結城友奈は勇者である-大満開の章-
synonyms: Yuki Yuna is a Hero Season 3
สาวน้อยชมรมผู้กล้า ภาค 3
synopsis: The third season of Yuuki Yuuna wa Yuusha de Aru . The magical girls of the Sanshu Middle School Hero Club have one goal: to make people smile whenever they can and to always help those in need. Through teamwork and the help of their magical powers, Yuna, Mimori, Fuu, Itsuki, Karin and Sonoko have vanquished deadly Vertexes, recovered a missing friend and balanced their lives as magical girls and regular middle school students. Now a new adventure begins, one that will test their skills and their bond as friends alike. (Source: Sentai Filmworks)

synopsis: The second season of Tiger & Bunny . Fighting for peace — and their sponsors — the odd couple of Wild Tiger and Barnaby continue to work as superheroes. But with the number of superheroes increasing around the world, how will these two veterans fare!? (Source: Netflix)

title: Isekai Quartet The Movie: Another World
titleEnglish: Isekai Quartet The Movie: Another World
titleNative: 異世界かるてっと ～あなざーわーるど～
synopsis: The homeroom class gets sucked through a wormhole into - you guessed it! - another world where they encounter a desolate environment dominated by a rampaging magical automaton. There they meet a girl-type golem with mannerisms similar to Megumin, a woman dressed in the same military uniform as Tanya, and a man with a cane who seems to know Subaru, and hijinks ensue. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Winter Cup Highlights Episode 3 – Winter Cup Highlights -Crossing the Door-
titleRomaji: Kuroko no Basket: Winter Cup Soushuu-hen - Tobira no Mukou
titleEnglish: Winter Cup Highlights Episode 3 – Winter Cup Highlights -Crossing the Door-
titleNative: 黒子のバスケ ウインターカップ総集編　～扉の向こう～
synonyms: Kuroko's Basketball Movie 3: Winter Cup Highlights - Crossing the Door
synopsis: Third of three compilation films of the Kuroko no Basket franchise. Rakuzan and Shutoku face off in the semi finals at the Winter Cup. Despite struggling with Akashi's Emperor Eye that sees through everything, Midorima and Takao fight back with their consecutive plays, and the whole Shutoku team bites back at Rakuzan. However, it doesn't take long before Akashi crushes all of their hopes. It is decided that the finals will be fought between Seirin and Rakuzan. Kagami immediately enters the Zone as soon as the match starts, but it is no match for Akashi. Facing an extreme difference in ability against Rakuzan, Seirin loses their hope a number of times during the match. However, Kuroko doesn't give up, and continues to strongly fight against Akashi. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: High School Fleet Movie
titleNative: 劇場版 ハイスクール・フリート
synopsis: The students of four marine high schools, including Yokosuka Girls, participate in an operation to prevent pirates manning a heavily-armed seafort from making its way to Japan. During this time, Mashiro struggles with an important decision: to become the captain of a ship or stay with the Harekaze and her friends.

title: Kakuriyo -Bed & Breakfast for Spirits-
titleNative: かくりよの宿飯
synopsis: The series centers on a female college student named Aoi, who inherited the ability to see spirits from her late grandfather. Aoi prides herself on her cooking, and one day she's feeding some agricultural spirits when suddenly a god and the master of the "Tenshinya" (Heavenly Inn) appears and takes Aoi away. He says that due to her grandfather's debts, she must become his bride. Aoi hates this idea and instead declares that she will pay back her grandfather's debt by working at the Tenshinya. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Tada Never Falls In Love
titleNative: 多田くんは恋をしない
synonyms: ทาดะคุงไม่ตกหลุมรัก
synopsis: Mitsuyoshi Tada, a boy who has never known love, is taking pictures of the cherry blossoms in full bloom when he meets Teresa Wagner, a transfer student from Luxembourg. Upon arriving in Japan, she got lost, separated from her travel companion. Mitsuyoshi helps her and brings her to his grandfather's coffee shop. (Source: Anime News Network)
